import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, textwrap, math

path_q = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
len(os.listdir("/mnt/data")), os.path.exists(path_h), os.path.exists(path_q)

import json, itertools

    hadith_db = json.load(f)
type(hadith_db), len(hadith_db)

def norm_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return None
    # remove tashkeel and tatweel and punctuation; unify hamza, normalize alif maqsura/ya, taa marbuta?
    s2 = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch not in '\u064b\u064c\u064d\u064e\u064f\u0650\u0651\u0652\u0653\u0654\u0670' )
    # normalize hamza forms to alif
    s2 = s2.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # taa marbuta to ha? maybe keep
    s2 = s2.replace('ى','ي')
    s2 = s2.replace('ة','ه')  # maybe helpful for matching
    # remove tatweel
    s2 = s2.replace('ـ','')
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits
    s2 = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9 ]+',' ',s2)
    # collapse spaces
    s2 = re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s2).strip()
    return s2

query_snip = "لا يفلح قو...مرهم امرأة"

query = "لا يفلح قوم ولوا أمرهم امرأة"
cands = [
    "لَنْ يُفْلِحَ قَوْمٌ وَلَّوْا أَمْرَهُمُ امْرَأَةً . ",
    "لَنْ يُفْلِحَ قَوْمٌ وَلَّوْا أَمْرَهُمُ امْرَأَةً",
]
def normalize_for_similarity(s):
    # similar to norm_ar but keep hamza unify etc.
    s2 = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch not in '\u064b\u064c\u064d\u064e\u064f\u0650\u0651\u0652\u0653\u0654\u0670' )
    s2 = s2.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s2 = s2.replace('ى','ي')
    s2 = s2.replace('ة','ه')
    s2 = s2.replace('ـ','')
    s2 = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9 ]+',' ',s2)
    s2 = re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s2).strip()
    return s2

def lcs(a,b):
    # LCS length
    a = a.split()
    b = b.split()
    n,m = len(a),len(b)
    dp = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(m):
            dp[i+1][j+1] = dp[i][j]+1 if a[i]==b[j] else max(dp[i][j+1], dp[i+1][j])
    return dp[n][m], n, m

def token_f1(a,b):
    sa = a.split()
    sb = b.split()
    inter = len(set(sa)&set(sb))
    prec = inter/len(sa) if sa else 0
    rec = inter/len(sb) if sb else 0
    if prec+rec==0: return 0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

nq = normalize_for_similarity(query)
print("Query norm:",nq)
for c in cands:
    nc = normalize_for_similarity(c)
    L,n,m = lcs(nq,nc)
    lcs_ratio = L/max(n,m)
    f1 = token_f1(nq,nc)
    print("cand:",c,"norm:",nc,"LCS:",L,n,m,lcs_ratio,"F1:",f1)

def norm_char(s):
    # similar normalization but keep spaces for char-level?
    s2 = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch not in '\u064b\u064c\u064d\u064e\u064f\u0650\u0651\u0652\u0653\u0654\u0670')
    s2 = s2.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ة','ه').replace('ـ','')
    s2 = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9 ]+',' ',s2)
    s2 = re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s2).strip()
    return s2

def lcs_char(a,b):
    # char-level LCS
    n,m = len(a),len(b)
    dp = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    for i in range(n):
        ai=a[i]
        for j in range(m):
            dp[i+1][j+1] = dp[i][j]+1 if ai==b[j] else max(dp[i][j+1], dp[i+1][j])
    return dp[n][m],n,m

nq = norm_char(query)
nc = norm_char("لَنْ يُفْلِحَ قَوْمٌ وَلَّوْا أَمْرَهُمُ امْرَأَةً")
L,n,m = lcs_char(nq,nc)
L, n, m, L/max(n,m)

nc = norm_char(correct_phrase)
L,n,m = lcs_char(nq,nc)
ratio = L/max(n,m)
nq, nc, L, n, m, ratio
